title: Ice Cover Duration 2016-present (raster 20 m, LAEA projection), Europe, annually
description: The Ice Cover Duration (ICD) product is generated once a year. It provides an estimated number of days on which ice covers inland waters across Europe during the hydrological year.  The hydrological year begins on 1 September. The ICD is derived from Water/Ice Cover (WIC) products, which are based on observations from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2. It has a spatial resolution of 20 m x 20 m. This product corresponds to a reprojection of the native product to the LAEA (Lambert azimuthal equal-area projection) grid.

links.title: Legal notice on the use of Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) data
Homepage of the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service

cdse-s3.title: Copernicus Data Space Ecosystem S3
cdse-s3.description: This endpoint provides access to EO data which is stored on the object storage of both CloudFerro Cloud and OpenTelekom Cloud (OTC). See the [documentation](https://documentation.dataspace.copernicus.eu/APIs/S3.html) for more information, including how to get credentials.

creodias-s3.title: CREODIAS S3
creodias-s3.description: Comprehensive Earth Observation Data (EODATA) archive offered by CREODIAS as a commercial part of CDSE, designed to provide users with access to a vast repository of satellite data without predefined quota limits

ICD.title: Ice Cover Duration (days)
ICD.description: Number of days of ice cover on water over the hydrological year (between 0 and 366)

NOBS1.title: Number of days with Sentinel-1 based observations over the hydrological year.
NOBS1.description: Number of days with Sentinel-1 based observations used in the interpolation of the ice cover time series (between 0 and 366).

NOBS2.title: Number of days with Sentinel-2 based observations over the hydrological year.
NOBS2.description: Number of days with Sentinel-2 based observations used in the interpolation of the ice cover time series (between 0 and 366).

ICD-QA.title: Quality layer for the Ice Cover Duration (ICD) layer
ICD-QA.description: Quality layer providing basic assessment of the Ice Cover Duration layer.

ICD-MTD.title: ICD auxiliary metadata
ICD-MTD.description: GDAL auxiliary metadata associated with the ICD raster layer (color table)

NOBS1-MTD.title: NOBS1 auxiliary metadata
NOBS1-MTD.description: GDAL auxiliary metadata associated with the NOBS1 raster layer (color table)

NOBS2-MTD.title: NOBS2 auxiliary metadata
NOBS2-MTD.description: GDAL auxiliary metadata associated with the NOBS2 raster layer (color table)

ICD-QA-MTD.title: ICD-QA auxiliary metadata
ICD-QA-MTD.description: GDAL auxiliary metadata associated with the ICD-QA raster layer (color table)
